channel.title: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Channon and Chris Suffer a Living Nightmare Before the End
item.description: A factual look at the tragic case of Channon and Chris, summarizing the events, investigation, and the impact of this devastating story.

media:content.media:title: Channon and Chris Suffer a Living Nightmare Before the End
media:content.media:description: A factual look at the tragic case of Channon and Chris, summarizing the events, investigation, and the impact of this devastating story.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Who did these hairs belong to?
item.description: A look at mysterious hair evidence, exploring forensic analysis and the investigation into identifying the individuals involved.

media:content.media:title: Who did these hairs belong to?
media:content.media:description: A look at mysterious hair evidence, exploring forensic analysis and the investigation into identifying the individuals involved.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Angela seemed proud of what she had done!
item.description: A factual overview examining the events surrounding Angela’s actions, focusing on the investigation and key details with a clear and respectful approach.

media:content.media:description: A factual overview examining the events surrounding Angela’s actions, focusing on the investigation and key details with a clear and respectful approach.

item.title: Final Part Of The Sickening Maliyah Bass Case
item.description: The final part of the Maliyah Bass case is examined. A factual and respectful look at how one of the most troubling cases reached its conclusion.

item.title: The Sumner Case: Motive and Investigation
